completed_tasks.name: Plan 01 — Project Plan view scaffold + Frappe Gantt integration
Plan 02 — task tree, modal, dependencies, FS-violation overlay
Plan 03 — assignees + Tier-2 progress permission rules
Plan 04 — inline progress slider + cycle detection + recompute
Plan 05 — summary card + weighted parent rollup + filter panel
Code review fix iter-1 — 5 Critical (CR-01..CR-05) + 11 Warning (WR-01..WR-11) all fixed in 16 atomic commits
Code review fix iter-2 — 3 of 4 surfaced warnings fixed (WR-02, WR-03, WR-04); 1 skipped (TASK-ID race, user-acknowledged)
Cumulative REVIEW-FIX.md committed (covers all 20 findings, 19 fixed, 1 residual)

remaining_tasks.name: Manual UAT in browser — verify CR-02 (parent date wipe), CR-04 (onclick refactor across task tree, filter pills, modal pills, delete confirm, code-issuance), WR-02 iter-2 (3-level recompute), WR-04 iter-2 (progress NaN guard)
WR-01 user-acknowledged residual — TASK-ID race needs runTransaction infrastructure (export from firebase.js, refactor generateTaskId + saveTaskFromModal). Deferred — track for future infra phase
After UAT: /gsd-verify-work or advance to next phase per ROADMAP.md

blockers.description: Org monthly usage limit hit during iter-3 re-review of --auto loop. Iter-2 patches were spot-checked manually instead — minimal, syntactically clean. Loop terminated cleanly with cumulative report committed.
blockers.workaround: Manual spot-check of iter-2 commits (0144085, 83c2a01, 0cb9e6d) confirmed correctness. No regressions observed in patches. Re-running iter-3 unnecessary if manual UAT passes.

human_actions_pending.action: Browser UAT — exercise the Project Plan view: edit parent task (verify dates persist), click task tree rows (verify selection works after onclick->data-attr refactor), toggle filter pills, open task modal, save with progress slider value, delete task with subtree, add nested chain of 3+ levels and edit grandchild past parent envelope to confirm WR-02 recursive recompute
human_actions_pending.context: All 19 code-fix patches pass syntax checks but several involve behavioral changes that require runtime verification. Listed in 86-REVIEW-FIX.md 'Verification Notes' section.

human_actions_pending.action: Decide whether to defer or invest in runTransaction infrastructure for TASK-ID race
human_actions_pending.context: Iter-1 chose lowest-scope fix (retry-on-collision via getDoc check, 5 attempts). Iter-2 review noted TOCTOU window remains. Full fix needs runTransaction export from firebase.js + counter doc OR addDoc with auto-id. Tracked in 86-REVIEW-FIX.md as user-acknowledged.

decisions.decision: Default --fix scope (critical_warning, no --all): info-level findings deferred
decisions.rationale: User invoked /gsd-code-review --fix 86 then chose --auto for iteration mode. Default scope per command spec is critical+warning. Info findings (4 in iter-1, 5 in iter-2) left for future polish.

decisions.decision: CR-03 lowest-scope fix (retry-on-collision) over runTransaction migration
decisions.rationale: runTransaction not currently exported from app/firebase.js. Adding it would broaden scope beyond a code-review fix into infrastructure refactor. Retry-on-collision narrows the race window; user-acknowledged residual documented for future.

decisions.decision: CR-04 escapeHTML->data-attr refactor used the 'data-* + addEventListener' pattern (review's preferred fix), not the JSON.stringify alternative
decisions.rationale: Matches existing pattern in the same file (personnel-pill click-outside handler). 5 surfaces refactored: task tree rows, filter pills, modal pills, delete confirm, code-issuance overlay. Listeners re-attach on every innerHTML rewrite per iter-2 reviewer verification.

decisions.decision: Loop terminated at iter-2 fix (not iter-3) due to org usage limit; no full third re-review run
decisions.rationale: Iter-3 reviewer agent failed before producing output (org monthly usage limit). Manually spot-checked iter-2 commits via git show — patches minimal and correct. iter-3 backup files (.iter3.md duplicates) cleaned up; iter-2 backups preserved as audit trail.

next_action: Run manual UAT in browser before advancing. Start dev server (python -m http.server 8000), navigate to a project, exercise Project Plan: parent task edit, child task with progress slider, dependency creation, FS-violation overlay, nested 3-level recompute. Specifically verify the CR-04 onclick refactor (clicks on task tree rows, filter pills, delete confirm) since this was the largest behavioral change.
context_notes: Phase 86 implementation (5 plans, ~1100 lines view code, new project_tasks collection + tier-2 rules, Frappe Gantt integration) was complete before this session. This session only ran the code-review-fix --auto loop on the existing implementation. 19 atomic fix commits + 1 cumulative docs commit. The TASK-ID race is the only known unaddressed warning, deliberately deferred. Working tree clean.
